title: beyeria lateralis
intro: Beyeria lateralis, also known as the Spotted Beyeria or Spotted Beyeria Bush, is a small shrub native to Western Australia, belonging to the family Cephalotaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which is used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Beyeria lateralis include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in reducing pain and inflammation, as well as treating wounds and skin conditions. The herbal preparations of Beyeria lateralis include its essential oil, which can be extracted through steam distillation, and is often used in aromatherapy and traditional medicine.
